text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, June 16. No work meetings today. You have a quiet dinner with the family and Sarah wanting to work on her design course.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Home maintenance is a constant cycle. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. Packing turkey sandwiches and apples for Ethan. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Meal planning saves so much time. Looks balanced. I can set a morning reminder to grab it from the fridge. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Space science and tech is a great focus. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. It was a really interesting history episode. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The lawn mower is having issues starting. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Automations are great when they work. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick update: Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. Yum, that sounds delicious! How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. We need to pack his shin guards and water bottle for practice. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. Sounds exciting! I've set a reminder so you have plenty of time for practice pickup. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Researching rover power systems in depth. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Space science and tech is a great focus. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! I've adjusted the local settings. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: That sounds like a sweet moment. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Barbecue went well and everyone liked the dinner. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
